---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**The problem / motivation**
What need or pain point does this address? Who benefits (which kind of shop owner)?

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you thought about.

**Anything else**
Mockups, examples, or extra context.
